title: Fidelity Harness Receipt
description: A tiered QA receipt emitted by the fidelity harness. Inherits the accuracy-near-guarantee discipline verbatim: PROBE_ERROR is never a pass; a render/parse crash never reads as 'fidelity OK'; receipts are TTL'd and environment-fingerprinted; each leg is labeled 'proven' (deterministic) vs 'judged' (behavioral). The overall gate can be PASS only if every leg verdict is 'pass'.

format.description: Output format certified. Both are locally certifiable; neither carries a 'not_captured' render gap.

ttl_seconds.description: Receipt validity window; a receipt older than this is stale and must be re-run (W5 discipline).

env_fingerprint.description: sha256 over the checker environment (tool versions/mtimes + key env vars). A receipt minted in a different environment cannot bless this run.

overall_gate.description: PASS only if every leg verdict is 'pass'. Any leg fail/not_captured/PARTIAL/PROBE_ERROR forces PARTIAL or FAIL (fail-closed). A missing Tier-B leg yields PARTIAL, never PASS.

manual_residue.description: The enumerated manual-WCAG / human-review residue (alt-text quality, reading-order sense, plain-language, substantive judgment). An EMPTY residue on a shipped report is itself a defect (over-claim).

leg.description: V1 value-accuracy, V2 frozen-complement diff, V3 re-inference isomorphism, V4 taint-egress over decoded container, V5 render referee, V6 manifest-completeness/coverage, period-coherence.

verdict.description: PROBE_ERROR (harness/parse crash), not_captured (leg could not run), and disabled (a blocking leg neutered by the test-only must-fail knob) are each distinct from pass and never count as pass; disabled additionally forces overall_gate off PASS. PARTIAL = ran degraded (e.g. V1 in binding-correctness mode with no live data route → Accurate fails closed).

label.description: proven = deterministic result; judged = behavioral/stochastic result. V2/V4/V6/period-coherence are always 'proven' and inference-independent.

inference_independent.description: true for the ML-free legs (V2, V4, V6, period-coherence) and the ML-free halves (V1 set-membership, V3 rule-based coarse cross-check). false for V1 recompute and V3 fine isomorphism.

blocking.description: true for V1, V2, V3, V4, V6, and period-coherence; V5 is proven-where-deterministic / judged-for-polish.

repeat_count.description: N of repeated-agreement runs for stochastic sub-steps (W5 N-agreement rule).

judge_fingerprint.description: Identity of the scoring judge for 'judged' legs, for reproducibility.

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence: the value located, the diff region, the token uncovered, the surviving taint match, etc.

allOf.description: PROBE_ERROR != pass, enforced at the gate: overall_gate PASS forbids any non-pass leg verdict.
